SEQUENCE.COMMENT: checkFailsafeMode - check if we are in Failsafe mode and running on the correct cluster/instance
This service can be called on all framework instances, and will read a status file to determine if the framework
is operating in normal mode or in queueing mode, or if its transitioning to or from either mode. Normal mode is
when documents are coming to the framework normally, and not being re-routed to the 28000 instances, while
queueing mode is when documents are being routed to the 28000 instances, but not to the regular framework
clusters. The current mode can also be 'in transtion' between the 2 modes, which means documents are accepted
on both the 28000 instances and the regular framework clusters at the same time.

EXIT.NAME: line=='NORMAL' && port == '28000'
EXIT.FAILURE-MESSAGE: Content received on 28000 during NORMAL processing
EXIT.COMMENT: Content received on 28000 during NORMAL processing

EXIT.NAME: line=='FULLQ' && port != '28000'
EXIT.FAILURE-MESSAGE: Content received on %port% during FAILSAFE processing
EXIT.COMMENT: Content received on %port% during FAILSAFE processing
